'''Bo-Attal''' was a [[Codru-Ji]] clan leader in [[137 ABY]]. The [[clan chief]] opposed the leadership of [[Rikkar-Du]], believing it followed the plans of the [[One Sith]] to build an [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Imperial]] base on [[Munto Codru/Legends|Munto Codru]].<ref name="Legacy 13" />

{{Char-stub}}
